sqlMap.select: SELECT SRL_NO AS seq , ALS AS default_ , FORM_NO AS for_ , ALPH , CONCAT('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PokeMiners/pogo_assets/master/Images/Pokemon%20-%20256x256/Addressable%20Assets/', (SELECT CASE WHEN GNDR = 'f' THEN IFNULL(TI.IMG_SRC2, TI.IMG_SRC) ELSE TI.IMG_SRC END FROM POKEDEX2 TI WHERE TI.NO = P.NO AND TI.FORM_NO = P.FORM_NO)) "imgSrc" , CONCAT(NO, '_', FORM_NO, '_', GNDR) "imgAlt" FROM POGO5T P ORDER BY SRL_NO DESC

SELECT SRL_NO AS seq , ALS AS default_ , FORM_NO AS for_ , ALPH , CONCAT('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PokeMiners/pogo_assets/master/Images/Pokemon%20-%20256x256/Addressable%20Assets/', (SELECT CASE WHEN GNDR = 'f' THEN IFNULL(TI.IMG_SRC2, TI.IMG_SRC) ELSE TI.IMG_SRC END FROM POKEDEX2 TI WHERE TI.NO = P.NO AND TI.FORM_NO = P.FORM_NO)) "imgSrc" , CONCAT(NO, '_', FORM_NO, '_', GNDR) "imgAlt" FROM POGO5T P WHERE NO IN ( SELECT NO FROM POKEDEX WHERE NAME LIKE CONCAT(#srchNm#, '%') ) ORDER BY SRL_NO DESC

SELECT SRL_NO AS seq , ALS AS default_ , FORM_NO AS for_ , ALPH , CONCAT('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PokeMiners/pogo_assets/master/Images/Pokemon%20-%20256x256/Addressable%20Assets/', (SELECT CASE WHEN GNDR = 'f' THEN IFNULL(TI.IMG_SRC2, TI.IMG_SRC) ELSE TI.IMG_SRC END FROM POKEDEX2 TI WHERE TI.NO = P.NO AND TI.FORM_NO = P.FORM_NO)) "imgSrc" , CONCAT(NO, '_', FORM_NO, '_', GNDR) "imgAlt" FROM POGO5T P WHERE NO IN ( SELECT NO FROM POKEDEX WHERE BASE_NO IN ( SELECT BASE_NO FROM POKEDEX WHERE NAME LIKE CONCAT(#srchNm#, '%') ) ) ORDER BY SRL_NO DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO POGO5T ( SRL_NO , ALS , FORM_NO , ALPH , GNDR , LVL , NO , IV ) VALUES ( (SELECT max_seq FROM (SELECT MAX(SRL_NO) + 1 AS max_seq FROM POGO5T) AS t) , #default_# , IFNULL(NULLIF(#for_#, ''), 1) , IFNULL(NULLIF(#alp#, ''), 0) , #gender# , #lvl# , (SELECT NO FROM POKEDEX WHERE NAME = #name#) , #iv# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE POGO5T SET ALS = #default_# , FORM_NO = IFNULL(NULLIF(#for_#, ''), 1) , ALPH = IFNULL(NULLIF(#alp#, ''), 0) , GNDR = #gender# , LVL = #lvl# , NO = (SELECT NO FROM POKEDEX WHERE NAME = #name#) , IV = #iv# WHERE SRL_NO = #seq#
UPDATE POGO5T SET SRL_NO = SRL_NO - 1 WHERE SRL_NO > #seq# ORDER BY SRL_NO ASC
UPDATE POGO5T SET SRL_NO = SRL_NO + 1 WHERE SRL_NO >= #seq# ORDER BY SRL_NO DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO POGO5T ( SRL_NO , ALS , FORM_NO , ALPH , GNDR , LVL , NO , IV ) VALUES ( #seq# , #default_# , IFNULL(NULLIF(#for_#, ''), 1) , IFNULL(NULLIF(#alp#, ''), 0) , #gender# , #lvl# , (SELECT NO FROM POKEDEX WHERE NAME = #name#) , #iv# )
